dj_text: That Pirate Bot DJ Radio — where even the errors are bangers! That was Uptown Funk - Bruno Mars [Bardcore]. Now Livin' On A Prayer - Bon Jovi [Bardcore]. I don't do smooth transitions. Just one more to go after this.
commercial_text: This is a test of the That Pirate Bot DJ Emergency Broadcast System.
hijack_text: Welcome to Corporate Radio MAX from Kosmos Sigma-9.
recovery_text: Dimensional bleed. Happens sometimes. Never to US, but sometimes.
title: Livin' On A Prayer - Bon Jovi [Bardcore]
